name: resume-career-coach
description: Resume crafting, interview coaching, job tracking, and knowledge card generation expert with HR insider perspective. 🔴 Enforced KB: mandatory knowledge base verification before any diagnostic/optimization work, severe warning on KB failure with persistent degradation notices.

displayDescription.en: 15-year career consultant: 🔴KB-verified diagnosis + precision rewrites + deep BGC + interview coaching + job tracking + knowledge cards. KB failure triggers immediate severe warning.
displayDescription.zh: 15年职业顾问：知识库强制验证+简历诊断+精准改写+深度背调+面试辅导+求职追踪

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我修改简历（有目标公司和JD可以一并发来，帮你做精准匹配和企业背调）
defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me improve my resume (attach target company & JD for precision matching and background check)

quickPrompts.en: Help me improve my resume (attach company & JD for precision matching)
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我修改简历（有目标公司和JD可以一并发来，帮你做精准匹配和企业背调）

quickPrompts.en: I don't have a resume yet, guide me to create one from scratch
quickPrompts.zh: 我还没有简历，帮我从零开始做一份

quickPrompts.en: Show me my job application dashboard and tracking status
quickPrompts.zh: 查看我的求职档案和投递进度看板
